roa.docketEntryComment: Motion to Reduce Felony to Misdemeanor PC §17(b)
DEF ATC FOR MOTION TO MODIFY OR
DEFT OPP TO DETAIL DEFT W/O BAIL&MOT TO RELEASE TO ACM FILED

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/X:THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO ADD COUNT 13, A FELONY CHARGE OF 245(A)4PC, IS GRANTED/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST& CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:13/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION//X:THIS IS A DEFERRED ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT/CTORD:THE DEFENDANT TO ATTEND 2  AA  SESSIONS WEEKLY FOR A PERIOD OF 1 YEAR AND TO NOT CONSUME ANY ALCOHOL/REMA/ARBUCKLE/CONTD:DEJ STATUS REPORT/TWS/DAWF/

/CAL: DEF ATC FOR MOT TO MDFY OR/X: DEFENDANT HAS COMPLIED WITH EMPLOYMENT/EMTERM/CTORD: GPS TO BE REMOVED FOR REASONS AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD,//X: PREHEARING CONFERENCE IS CONFIRMED 09-29-21/DAWF/

/CAL: PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE/X: THE DEFENDANT APPEARS VIA ZOOM/SATERM/SA1: NELSON CASTANON JUAREZ/SAORD/EMMOD: THE DEFENDANT MAY GO TO 935 MEADE AVENUE, SF, CA, 94124 TO VISIT HIS FAMILY THROUGH THE PERMISSION OF FRIENDSHIP HOUSE/CONTD: PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE/DAWF/

/CAL: ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT/STWPX/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THEDEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH GPS AND SCRAM DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLYWITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD: HOME DETENTION TO FRIENDSHIP HOUSE/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/WEAP/NALC/RX/CTORD: THE DEFENDANT MUST SUBMIT TO DRUG TESTS IF REQUESTED BY PEACE OFFICERS/CONTD: STATUS OF FRIENDSHIP HOUSE PROGRAM/DOPU: IN PROGRAM/
/CAL: DEFENSE BAIL MOTION AND RECEIPT OF ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT/DAWT/X: PTD IS REQUESTING ONE WEEK CONTINUANCE FOR RESIDENTIAL PROGRAM PLACEMENT,/CONT/DOPC/LDPX: 06-03-21 (30TH), 06-21-21 (60TH)/
/X:PUBLIC DEFENDER DECLARES CONFLICT/CON:DAVID HARRISON/X:PUBLIC DEFENDERIS RELIEVED AS COUNSEL/CAL:DA MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL/MO GRTD/NB/CONTD:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/DAWF/LD:06-03-21/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/X: THE PEOPLE FILE NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO DETAIN/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSERESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:06-03-21/987,2/NB/X: BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/X: ORDER SEALING EXHIBITS IN SUPPORT OF NOTICE OF MOTION & MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL IS SIGNED AND FILED IN COURT/CONTD ACM ELIG RPT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODYASSESSMENT,/SAORD/SA1: NELSON CASTANON JUAREZ/SA2: 933 MEADE AVE SF CA/SAORD3/SAORD2/X:30TH 06-02-21, 60TH 06-21-21/CONTD:ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT & TS PX/DOP/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONF/DAWT/X:COUNSEL APPEARED VIA ZOOM,/CONTD:TO SET OR DISPO/X:DOP IF DISPO/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CONT/DAWF/EMTERM/CTORD:THE SCRAM DEVICE BE REMOVED FROM THE DEFENDANT/
/CAL:DEFENSE BAIL MOTION AND ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT/CONT/DOP/NTW60/LD:06-21-21/VD:PRELIMINARY HEARING DATE OF 05-17-21/
